_note: Single-line {@const} must surface in-expression tsgo errors (here TS2304 on `nonexistentRef`). Pre-fix, {@const} emitted via append_verbatim (line-map), which records a mapping ONLY for multi-line bodies — so a single-line {@const} dropped its diagnostics entirely (under-report vs upstream). Fixed by emitting the declaration body via append_with_source (token-precise map), the same path declaration tags use. Found by the upstream audit.
